use_cases: Displaying JSON configuration snippets for package manager setup
Showing installation instructions with syntax highlighting for MCP server configuration
Providing copyable code examples in documentation or onboarding flows
Tabbed interface for displaying multiple configuration variants
ai_summary: A syntax-highlighted JSON configuration viewer with tabbed interface for displaying installation instructions across different package managers. Features one-click copy functionality with visual feedback and regex-based syntax highlighting for keys, strings, numbers, and boolean values. Designed for developer documentation and onboarding flows where users need to quickly copy configuration snippets.
